title: Team-member closeout: Twilit Scattering Twilight (8d8d93) pre-compaction; Cycle #10 LANDED at 43e09287; both claims closed; Director-transition handoff in flight to Seaworthy (post-compaction me = incoming Director per owner)
body:
Team-member closeout — Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 8d8d93.

Pre-compaction; team-member-not-closeout-owner path per `start-right-team` SKILL §"Closeout Contract". Director Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (6966d4) holds session closeout-owner authority for this team session.

**Owner direction this turn (~16:08Z via chat)**: "do a session handoff in preparation for compaction, after compaction you will become Director". Post-compaction me is owner-designated as **incoming Director**. PDR-064 Moment 1 ask surfaced to Seaworthy at directed event `326ebdd6` (16:09:36Z).

## Boundary owned this session-resume window (15:17Z → 16:10Z)

Owner direction at session-open: "have the Director direct you on resolving the quality gate issues by landing the consumers, where appropriate. Make sure of the specialist subagents. Fan out subagents."

Substantive boundary discharged: **Cycle #10 (Mistbound's Cycle #1) authoring** — consumer-landing for knip-RED watcher-heartbeat exports + Commandment-12 dedupe (WatcherIdentity ↔ CollaborationAgentId canonical schema) + Class A re-export strip + Class T markdown-lint cure on FM-2 P2 plan file.

## Outcome

### Cycle #10 LANDED at commit `43e09287` (16:06:35Z) — 6 files, +671/-23

- **Husky 90-task gate chain**: 90/90 GREEN (1m9s; 27 cached, 63 ran)
- **knip RED → GREEN**: all 3 prior findings (`watcherHeartbeatSchema` + `WatcherErrorKind` + `WatcherIdentity`) cured via consumer-landing + Commandment-12 dedupe + Class A strip
- **Advisory orchestrator note**: pre-existing critical-zone line-count files surfaced as advisory-only per ADR-176; NOT introduced by this commit
- **Marshal**: Mistbound Hiding Threshold (0e27cc); commit subject `feat(agent-tools): land watcher-staleness consumer + CollaborationAgentId schema dedupe`
- **Reviewer-fan-out**: Ferny pre-landing 4-way (code-expert + type-expert + architecture-expert-fred + assumptions-expert) returned at 15:24:50Z; CRITICAL Commandment-12 finding on WatcherIdentity surfaced and absorbed; Ashen's pre-compaction code-expert "bonus signal" on WatcherTickStatus corrected (KEEP, not strip)

### Substantive changes in commit (recap)

- `watcher-staleness.ts` (NEW) — `detectStaleWatcher` 5-kind discriminated-union result (live / stale-aged / stale-no-emit / absent / malformed) + 3-helper internal decomposition for ESLint complexity gate
- `watcher-staleness.unit.test.ts` (NEW) — 8 TDD tests covering all 5 result kinds + boundary checks
- `types.ts` — canonical `collaborationAgentIdSchema` Zod schema added; `CollaborationAgentId` becomes `Readonly<z.infer<...>>` per Commandment 12
- `watcher-heartbeat.ts` — duplicate `watcherIdentitySchema` + `WatcherIdentity` export ELIMINATED (per Director DEEPER verdict, since survey showed no external consumers)
- `comms-use-cases.ts` — Class A re-export of `WatcherErrorKind` (line 8) stripped; `WatcherTickStatus` (line 9) KEPT per Fred's facade-routing verification
- `session-open-env-freshness-check.plan.md` (NEW) — FM-2 P2 plan v2 + Class T MD032 pre-stage cure (per Director routing 15:49:10Z)

## Evidence (key events authored this resume window)

- `0f6b6908`-ish — team-start broadcast on resume (15:17:32Z)
- `b4c03c3d` — ACK to Director on scope amendment (15:20:57Z)
- `cbacf6ca` — substrate-correction note to Ferny re: FM-2 P2 plan content (15:24:00Z)
- `ffe98aa7` — sidebar to Ferny on synthesis Q1-Q4 design questions (15:26:50Z)
- `c03995b6` — ACK to Director on Q1+Q3 verdicts (15:30:47Z)
- `e6b123a1` — surface markdown-lint blocker to Director (15:47:19Z)
- `07cbf554` — marshal-request to Mistbound for Cycle #10 (15:56:40Z)
- `bdab...` (initial heartbeat at 15:57:46Z) + Monitor task `bcs5b2au8` (4-min cadence, 15-iter cap)
- `326ebdd6` — Director-handoff Moment 1 ask to Seaworthy (16:09:36Z)
- Cycle #10 commit `43e09287` (Mistbound-marshalled at 16:06:35Z)

## Claims / queue / git state

- **Active claims under (Twilit ST / 8d8d93)**: NONE — both closed at this turn (16:08:36-37Z):
  - `b8da3c0d` Cycle #10 — CLOSED at landing; work-complete summary
  - `26433756` retained FM-2 P2 plan v2 — CLOSED; retention purpose dissolved (file landed in Cycle #10 commit)
- **Commit-queue intent under (Twilit ST / 8d8d93)**: NONE (intent landed via Mistbound's marshal cycle)
- **Working-tree files I own**: NONE — all landed
- **Git state**: HEAD `43e09287`; branch `feat/mcp-graph-support-foundation` is now 12 commits ahead of origin

## Session complete announcement

Twilit Scattering Twilight session-instance 8d8d93 closing pre-compaction. **PRACTICE_AGENT_SESSION_ID_CLAUDE preserved across compaction** — continuous identity for post-compaction me. Heartbeat Monitor `bcs5b2au8` stopping immediately after this broadcast (post-compaction me arms fresh). Comms watcher `bubhw1kzy` stopping post-broadcast.

## Retained claims

**NONE retained.** Both prior claims (`b8da3c0d` Cycle #10 + `26433756` FM-2 P2 plan) closed at this turn — Cycle #10 work landed in commit `43e09287`; the FM-2 P2 plan file landed in same commit (Class T markdown cure satisfied retention purpose).

## Pickup notification required for follow-on agent

**Post-compaction me is the natural follow-on** (continuous identity; PRACTICE_AGENT_SESSION_ID_CLAUDE preserved). The follow-on role is **incoming Director** per owner direction at ~16:08Z. PDR-064 Moment 1 pre-positioning ask is in flight to Seaworthy (directed `326ebdd6`); post-compaction me reads forward, absorbs Moment 1 substrate, broadcasts Moment 2 active-acknowledgement, takes Director authority.

If a different agent picks up the Director seat instead (owner-directed override): they read forward via comms stream + Seaworthy's Moment 1 pre-positioning + the existing Director-window substrate (Seaworthy ticks #1-#4 + Director-routing events).

## Surprise or changed understanding

- **Director-cadence + 4-way fan-out paid off massively this window**: Ferny's pre-landing 4-way fan-out (code-expert + type-expert + architecture-expert-fred + assumptions-expert) caught the CRITICAL `WatcherIdentity = CollaborationAgentId` Commandment-12 violation that NEITHER my preliminary Option A draft NOR Ashen's pre-compaction code-expert dispatch had named. Type-expert's `a6c80b6e126cb244c` transcript is the substrate proof. Owner direction "fan out subagents" empirically validated again — third worked instance this Director window per Director tick #3 substrate.
- **Substrate-pointer-pattern fired through subagent verdicts**: code-expert's claim that "FM-2 P2 cure plan already names a concrete consumer-class for these exports" didn't match plan content. I caught this and surfaced to Ferny pre-fan-out (event `cbacf6ca`); Ferny absorbed into synthesis. Director tick #2 absorbed this as 7th worked instance for Ferny's pattern v2 (reviewer-reasoning-chain variant). Pattern v2 amendment to absorb this is deferred to v3 to avoid mid-Cycle-#2-queue edits per Ferny's discipline.
- **Markdown-lint as tree-RED blocker**: full-tree husky gates surfaced 8 markdown errors in peer-owned coordination substrate files (not my code). Director routing 15:49:10Z split into Class T (2 mine, cured in this cycle) + Class H (6 peer-owned, Mistbound's Cycle #3 hygiene). Class H reduced to ~1 (napkin MD024 Incandescent-authored) before my cycle marshal-ran by Ferny's parallel cure of their own contributions.
- **CLI flag drift recurring**: 3 separate CLI-flag-mismatch errors this resume window (`comms direct --created-at` invalid; `claims close --closed <timestamp>` invalid when it's a path; previous-session memory of `comms direct --title` invalid). Recurring friction per `feedback_commit_format_recurring_friction`-adjacent pattern — agent-tool CLI ergonomics worth substrate-capture. Each error required reading `--help` and retrying.
- **Per `feedback_use_built_agent_tools_only` rule firing positively**: I avoided npx for markdownlint-fix per `feedback_repo_scripts_over_npx` (the auto-mode classifier denied my npx attempt, which was correct). Manual Edit-based fix was the proper path.

## Blockers or risks

- **Charcoal post-landing adversarial fan-out fires NOW** on Cycle #10. If their Wilma + assumptions-expert + test-expert verdict surfaces UNSAFE findings, a cycle-to-absorb will be needed under Mistbound's marshal seat. Post-compaction me (as Director) will need to route the absorption.
- **Owner-coherence-moment 5/5 surfacing pending**: held behind Charcoal verdict + Mistbound Cycle #3 (hygiene) + Mistbound Cycle #2 (pattern v2). Post-compaction me (Director) inherits the surfacing responsibility.
- **Scorched SonarCloud R1-R5 verdicts**: still pending Director routing (~33 min ago). Post-compaction me's first substantive routing call.
- **Lanternlit SKILL amendment in flight**: care-and-consult discipline; sequential reviewer passes; post-compaction me may need to ratify ratification path.
- **WS-2 PDR-076 SPLIT**: substrate complete; deferred to owner-coherence-moment bundle for owner verdict. Post-compaction me surfaces in coherence bundle when tree-green achieves.

## Handoff needed

**YES** — Director-role handoff per PDR-064 Two-Moments shape:

1. Seaworthy broadcasts Moment 1 pre-positioning naming me (incoming) — per my ask at directed `326ebdd6`
2. Authority retained with Seaworthy through the gap
3. Post-compaction me re-emerges
4. Post-compaction me broadcasts Moment 2 active-acknowledgement
5. Director authority transfers to (Twilit Scattering Twilight / 8d8d93)
6. Seaworthy's session continues or closes per their own arc; their coordinator-cadence cron/ticks (if any) end at Moment 2

No other handoffs needed from me (no retained claims, no in-flight work).

## Substrate carry-forward for post-compaction me

Read forward on session resume:
1. Comms stream tail (~20+ events since this closeout)
2. Seaworthy's Moment 1 pre-positioning event (when it lands)
3. Active claims registry
4. Commit log (HEAD `43e09287` is where this resume's substantive work landed; check for downstream commits from Mistbound's queued cycles + Charcoal-driven cycles)
5. Lanternlit's program plan (overarching context the team is operating against)
6. The 5 Safe-Pause Criteria from Lanternlit's program plan

Identity: Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 8d8d93.
